ideation: This animation sequence simulates pressing a button.  The robot will use its right arm to point to the button, then press it. The left arm will remain mostly still to balance the motion. Frame 1 will show the robot's right arm pointing towards the button. Frame 2 will show the right arm moving towards the button. Frame 3 will show the right arm pressing the button. Frame 4 will show the right arm returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: right arm points, left arm stays put
right arm moves to press the button
right arm firmly presses the button
